title: Legislative Process
shortSummary: Navigate the legislative process from bill drafting to Royal Assent. Understand committee systems, parliamentary procedure, amendments, and how to actually get legislation passed.
whyItMatters: Legislation is how political promises become reality. Understanding the legislative process — its rules, its bottlenecks, and its opportunities — separates politicians who talk about change from those who deliver it.
coreConcepts: How a bill becomes law in Australia
First reading, second reading, committee, third reading
Private members' bills and government bills
